markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on growth initiatives, technical fixes, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New CMS Needed:** The current blog CMS ("DCAP") is a major bottleneck, causing 5–10 min publish delays and limiting design flexibility. A replacement is a high priority.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [**Technical Debt Fixes:** A site audit revealed 21 broken 404 links and 17 empty pages. These require immediate fixes to improve SEO and user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [**Publishing Workflow Bottleneck:** The current PR review process by Firkin causes a 1–2 day publishing delay. A proposal for an automated workflow will be created to resolve this.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [**New Reporting Dashboard:** A dashboard will track SEO performance (CTR, position) for templates and guides, with a competitive analysis against Replit, V0, and Base44 to follow.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)

## Topics

### Internal Process & Ownership Gaps

  - [**Website Ownership:** No single owner exists for the website. This lack of accountability blocks progress on critical fixes and strategic decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [**Blog CMS:** The current CMS ("DCAP") is a key bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
      - [**Problems:** 5–10 minute publish delays, poor UX, and limited design flexibility.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
      - [**Goal:** Replace it with a more modern, flexible solution. A custom, Lovable-built CMS is a possibility.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [**GrowthHackers Redirects:** George is project managing redirects for old, thin "how-to" pages created by the former agency.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
      - [**Decision:** If GrowthHackers remains unresponsive, Lovable will execute the redirects internally.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)

### Technical Site Audit Findings

  - [A technical audit identified high-priority site hygiene issues.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [**Required Fixes:**](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
      - [**Broken Links:** 21 pages returning 404 errors.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
      - [**Empty Pages:** 17 pages with no content.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=552.0)
  - [**Action:** George will provide the Google Doc with all affected URLs to Ceci for assignment.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)

### Content Publishing Workflow

  - [**Problem:** The current PR review process by Firkin creates a significant bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
      - [**Process:** GrowthX engineer submits PR → Firkin reviews/merges.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
      - [**Impact:** Causes a 1–2 day publishing delay and consumes Firkin's time.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
  - [**Solution:** George will draft a proposal for an automated workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The process is for content, not code, and has been validated. An automated GitHub integration can handle checks.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
      - [**Action:** Ceci and Rachel will present the proposal to Firkin.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)

### SEO Performance Reporting

  - [**Goal:** Track the impact of SEO efforts for board updates and internal strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)
  - [**Dashboard:** A new dashboard will track week-over-week performance (CTR, position).](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
      - [**Views:** Dedicated views for templates, guides, and total non-branded traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=782.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Usable data will be available in 15–20 days.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [**Competitive Analysis:** George will investigate adding a competitive view to the dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
      - [**Competitors:** Replit, V0, Base44, and potentially Bolt.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
      - [**Purpose:** To benchmark Lovable's growth rate against the market.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=857.0)

### New Initiatives & Collaboration

  - [**Templates:** The template creation process is efficient, using an AI agent to build templates directly in Lovable.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)
      - [**Action:** Link the templates page from the main navigation to increase discovery.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** GrowthX can create templates based on content from Lovable's influencer partners.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [**Landing Pages:** GrowthX will provide SEO best practices for new persona landing pages launching next week.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
      - [**Action:** This will be a post-launch optimization, not a pre-launch review.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [**Slush Talk:** George will provide talking points for Ceci's upcoming "slush talk" on automation.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**George:**](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
      - [Draft the proposal for an automated content publishing workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
      - [Investigate adding competitive analysis to the SEO dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
      - [Provide talking points for Ceci's "slush talk."](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [**Ceci:**](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
      - [Assign the technical audit fixes (404s, empty pages) to an owner.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=584.0)
      - [Present the automated workflow proposal to Firkin with Rachel.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
  - [**Rachel:**](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
      - [Present the automated workflow proposal to Firkin with Ceci.](https://fathom.video/share/CUkVh48zDy9_Xy4BgQQgGj8AxRDrYu6D?tab=summary&timestamp=1040.0)
